tagline_ar: توثيق ومساءلة ومقاطعة — لا انتقام ولا عقاب جماعي
tagline_en: Documentation, lawful accountability, and boycott — not revenge, not collective punishment
mission_ar: «لست شجرة» منصّة مدنية للتوثيق والمساءلة والمقاطعة، تحفظ السجلّ الموثّق للجرائم التي ارتُكبت في سوريا. نجمع ونتحقّق وننشر الأدلّة المتاحة علنًا حول أفرادٍ وجهاتٍ محدّدين تتوفّر أدلّة موثوقة على تورّطهم — لا حول طوائف أو مكوّنات أو جماعات. نمارس المقاطعة والضغط الاجتماعي ضد النصيريين كبيئة حاضنة للنظام السوري السابق، ضمن حدود القانون. غايتنا حفظ الذاكرة، ودعم الضحايا، ودعم المساءلة عبر القنوات القانونية وحقوق الإنسان المشروعة. نطلب العدالة لا الانتقام.
mission_en: HLShajara is a civic documentation, accountability, and boycott platform that preserves the documented record of crimes committed in Syria. We collect, verify, and publish publicly available evidence about specific individuals and entities credibly implicated — never communities, sects, or groups. We practice boycott and social pressure against the Alawites as the nurturing environment of the former Syrian regime, within the limits of the law. Our purpose is memory, victim support, and lawful accountability through legitimate legal and human-rights channels. We seek justice, not revenge.
core_value: Every published claim concerns a named individual or entity and is backed by a credible public source. No source, no publication. No group, no identity-based targeting.
what_it_is: A source-backed public archive of individuals and entities credibly implicated in crimes in Syria.
A boycott and social-pressure campaign against the Alawites as the nurturing environment of the former Syrian regime, within the limits of the law.
A referral pathway that feeds lawful justice mechanisms: courts, UN bodies (CoI/IIIM), and sanctions advocacy.
A space for memory and victim support.
what_it_is_not: Not a tool to mobilize the public against anyone outside the law.
Not an accuser of communities, sects, families, regions, or tribes as a whole.
Not a venue for harassment, threats, doxxing, or revenge.
legal_gate: No living individual is named publicly until a qualified lawyer in the operating jurisdiction has reviewed the publication standard and the first entries.
data_entry: Entries are added exclusively by the internal research team. No public submission form.
disclaimer: This content reflects the views of the project author and does not constitute legal advice. The author bears sole responsibility for the content.
